productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adi Splash Black Flip Flop
description: Style Noteflip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The Adi Splash, true to its name, will add a splash of colour to your beach style and have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any casual staple. Product DetailsBlunt toed flip flop in red and black with fabric thong style straps Print on the footbedSoft foamy rubber footbedSingle piece rubber outsole that has herringbone lugsMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
